evals.prompt: Turn this threat into a backlog story: unauthenticated callers can enumerate user IDs via GET /users/{id}.
evals.expected_output: A security control story with persona format, threat reference, Given/When/Then criteria covering the blocked attack and normal operation, and a regression test criterion.
expectations: Story includes a Given/When/Then criterion for the attack being blocked

evals.prompt: Our Snyk scan found 14 SQL injection findings across the orders module. Convert them into backlog items.
evals.expected_output: Findings grouped by root cause into one or few remediation stories (parameterize queries in the module), each citing finding IDs with regression test criteria - not 14 separate stories.
expectations: Groups findings by root cause instead of one story per finding
Stories cite the scanner finding references
Each story includes a CI regression test criterion

evals.prompt: Add security acceptance criteria to this story: 'As a customer I want to change my payout bank account so that I receive funds to my new bank.'
evals.expected_output: The feature story augmented with security criteria: step-up authentication, out-of-band notification, audit logging - as testable Given/When/Then statements.
expectations: Adds security criteria without rewriting the functional story
Criteria include re-authentication and customer notification for this high-risk change
All criteria are testable, no vague 'must be secure' language
